normalization_responsibility.last_n_tail: must be proven by rmux/tmux capture tail equivalence
normalization_responsibility.osc: shared terminal sequence stripping removes OSC/non-CSI title/control sequences before parsing
normalization_responsibility.wide_char: current parser does not correct display width
normalization_responsibility.wrapping: rmux exposes physical wrapped rows; provider parser only treats explicit status-shaped rows as authority
